code:
from dataclasses import dataclass

@dataclass
class Triple:
    subject: str
    predicate: str
    object: str

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START

def predict(triples: list[Triple]) -> str:
    if not triples:
        return ""

    # Mapping from predicate to a human‑readable phrase (used in “The … of SUBJECT is OBJECT.”)
    phrase_map = {
        "cityServed": "city served",
        "elevationAboveTheSeaLevel": "elevation above sea level",
        "elevationAboveTheSeaLevelInFeet": "elevation above sea level in feet",
        "runwayLength": "runway length",
        "runwayName": "runway name",
        "location": "location",
        "operatingOrganisation": "operating organisation",
        "country": "country",
        "isPartOf": "part",
        "icaoLocationIdentifier": "ICAO code",
        "locationIdentifier": "location identifier",
        "iataLocationIdentifier": "IATA code",
        "1stRunwayLengthFeet": "first runway length in feet",
        "1stRunwayLengthMetre": "first runway length in metres",
        "1stRunwaySurfaceType": "first runway surface type",
        "1stRunwayNumber": "first runway number",
        "2ndRunwaySurfaceType": "second runway surface type",
        "3rdRunwaySurfaceType": "third runway surface type",
        "4thRunwaySurfaceType": "fourth runway surface type",
        "5thRunwaySurfaceType": "fifth runway surface type",
        "runwaySurfaceType": "runway surface type",
        "leader": "leader",
        "capital": "capital",
        "language": "language",
        "officialLanguage": "official language",
        "currency": "currency",
        "owner": "owner",
        "foundingYear": "founding year",
        "founder": "founder",
        "postalCode": "postal code",
        "areaCode": "area code",
        "largestCity": "largest city",
        "countySeat": "county seat",
        "mayor": "mayor",
        "leaderParty": "leader party",
        "leaderTitle": "leader title",
        "chief": "chief",
        "hubAirport": "hub airport",
        "regionServed": "region served",
        "nativeName": "native name",
        "class": "class",
        "division": "division",
        "order": "order",
        "demonym": "demonym",
    }

    clauses = []
    for t in triples:
        # Normalise object (remove surrounding quotes)
        obj = t.object.strip('"')
        phrase = phrase_map.get(t.predicate)
        if phrase:
            clause = f"The {phrase} of {t.subject} is {obj}"
        else:
            # Fallback: turn predicate into words
            pred_words = t.predicate.replace('_', ' ')
            clause = f"The {pred_words} of {t.subject} is {obj}"
        clauses.append(clause)

    # Join all clauses into a single fluent sentence
    if not clauses:
        return ""
    if len(clauses) == 1:
        return clauses[0] + "."
    else:
        # Use commas and a final “and”
        return ", ".join(clauses[:-1]) + ", and " + clauses[-1] + "."

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END
